policy.no_self_validation: Examples generated primarily to demonstrate a rule cannot validate that rule.
policy.productive_acceptance_minimum: verified scope-matched external sources, manually reviewed natural examples, two independent native-speaker reviews on the same contrasts, explicit boundaries, code-document alignment, render review, and prospective held-out success
policy.native_naturalness_evidence_rule: At least two independent native Cantonese speakers must review the same relevant positive and negative contrasts before supported_productive status.
policy.retroactive_reaudit: No prior productive acceptance is grandfathered; status becomes provisional_reaudit until current requirements pass.

evidence_limitations: Existing regression fixtures lack per-example natural-source provenance.
Existing corpus parser hits are discovery candidates and were not counted as validated analyses.
Existing accepted snapshots do not encode train/design/held-out partitions.
Native-speaker judgments are not construction-analysis validation unless the analysis itself was judged.
One native speaker completed sentence-naturalness screening only; internal label mappings remain candidate mappings and are not analysis validation.
All former supported_productive and current provisional language claims are under retroactive source and speaker re-audit.
Raw external_corpus_candidate_hit_count values are retrieval metadata only and have zero evidence weight until each hit is manually rechecked.
Internal render, regression, and held-out success measure implementation consistency, not linguistic confidence.

patterns.language_claim: Published Cantonese analyses and independently sourced examples attest V + 完 + 咗 + object ordering, with 完 inside the perfective scope; exact lexical, discourse, and speaker-variation boundaries remain research-pending.
patterns.parser_representation_decision: Canto Span represents V完 as an inner CompletionVP and 咗 plus the overt object as an outer PerfectiveVP. This scope representation is an engineering analysis aligned with published inner/outer-aspect accounts, not native-speaker analysis validation.
patterns.parser_heuristic: When visible action + 完 + 咗 + overt-object cues occur, the parser composes an inner completion predicate under outer perfective aspect. The heuristic must remain review-bearing for native-rejected surfaces and incompatible aspect orders.

patterns.parser_representation_decision: Canto Span represents the narrow supported relation with one IntendedFunctionRelation node. Direct resource NPs are not forced into a public Topic analysis; a Topic child is retained only when a separate overt user supports left dislocation. 用, 嚟/來, predicate material, controls, and particles remain transparent.
patterns.parser_heuristic: The parser selects IntendedFunctionRelation only when an overt non-person function-bearing resource precedes adjacent 用 + 嚟/來 and visible predicate material. Modal readings and perfective action material remain review-bearing. Lone-user, bare-linker, aspect-interrupted, A-not-A, reduplicated 用來用去, coordination, lexical-use, instrumental-use, and directional-motion environments remain outside this narrow replacement or blocked.
